through women and grief.
33-34. EFFECTS OF FAVOURABLE MARS’ DASA.
During the Dasa of favourable Mars, one will gain through kings, fire, thieves, enemies, snakes,
poison, weapons, confinements, fictitious articles, lands, goats, buffaloes, copper, gold,
prostitutes, gambling, intoxicants, pungent articles/juices, wealth and grains.
35-36 EFFECTS OF ADVERSE MARS’ DASA.
During the Dasa of evil Mars, there will be enmity with friends, wife, children and brothers,
sufferance from thirst, swooning, bloody defects, loss of limbs and wounds. There will be
attachment to others wives and irreligious acts, followed by aversion to elders and to truth.
Bilious excesses will trouble the subject.
37-39. EFFECTS OF FAVOURABLE MERCURY’S DASA.
In the Dasa of favourable Mercury, there will be gains via friends, children, wealth, king,
businessmen, priests, gambling etc.
